human_verification.notes: Reviewed boundaries, shared/industry abilities, source quality coverage, scenario mapping, and escalation posture for planning-only validated behavior.

Evaluation scenarios include all queue-level requirements, including conflict, evidence gap, adjacent-lane, and low-confidence escalation families.

notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguities remain for validated deployment; tracked ambiguities are runtime-specific.

This package remains specification-based and does not claim final approval, dispatch, or execution authority.
